query:
SELECT p.`batchNo`, se.`id` AS stationEventId, se.`stationCode`, se.`stationEventType`, se.`payload`, st.`metadata`
FROM `products` p
LEFT JOIN `station_events` se ON se.`productId` = p.`id`
LEFT JOIN `station_tasks` st ON st.`productId` = p.`id` AND st.`stationCode` = 'A1'
WHERE p.`batchNo` IN ('00500025209','00500025225','00500025228','00500025229','00500025239','00500025240','00500025241','00500025247','00500025252','00500025253','00500025256','00500025264','00500025266','00500025269','00500025271')
ORDER BY p.`batchNo` ASC, se.`id` ASC
LIMIT 80;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT p.`batchNo`, se.`id` AS stationEventId, se.`stationCode`, se.`stationEventType`, se.`payload`, st.`metadata`
FROM `products` p
LEFT JOIN `station_events` se ON se.`productId` = p.`id`
LEFT JOIN `station_tasks` st ON st.`productId` = p.`id` AND st.`stationCode` = 'A1'
WHERE p.`batchNo` IN ('00500025209','00500025225','00500025228','00500025229','00500025239','00500025240','00500025241','00500025247','00500025252','00500025253','00500025256','00500025264','00500025266','00500025269','00500025271')
ORDER BY p.`batchNo` ASC, se.`id` ASC
LIMIT 80;
